reviews.review_description: Recently (AKA multiple months ago.) I bought this game and thought it was online and private play, then I found out it’s either random people on discord or family members. So my saying: this is not online. (That’s all I want)

This game is so fun, i've had so much fun playing it, but i have just one question, are you the only developer? because if so, you are the best developer i have ever seen. Lastly, i know that someone already asked this, but pleas add quickplay, because i'm sure my family is getting tired of me asking them

Love the planks! Super fun puzzles and new mechanics in every level. I played with a friend who downloaded the Friends Pass on Steam. We played the first six levels before my Quest ran out of battery (forgot to charge it), and we are looking forward to playing the rest as soon as it is charged again.
to play i have to join a discord to play (the discord is nor possible to join it)

developer_response.body:
Hey Kingduckky,
Sorry to correct you, but you don't have to join our discord to play the game. You can play with any of your friends simply by giving them the join code of the server you create. The discord is only a way of finding other players in case you don't have someone to play yet.

If you have any questions or encounter any problems feel free to reach out via discord or any other channel.

reviews.review_description:
VR Giants delivers a unique cooperative VR adventure where one player steps into the shoes of Goliath, a towering giant, and another plays as David, a nimble companion. Solve creative puzzles across diverse levels while working together in an engaging and playful environment. Crossplay and Free Friend’s Pass make it easy to join the fun with friends.
A must have!

I played it with my daughter. The coop concept is perfect for us. The number of stages and various design of each stage were excellent even for early access. Sometime physics makes me mad but it can be also a funny part of this game. The resolution seems to be low for my quest3 and I hope more someday. The camera control makes me dizzy when playing as David. Following sight direction as if first person view like FPS can be a solution.  We tried to swap role but the progress was not saved for David and we should play from first stage when hosting as giant.  Is it correct?

developer_response.body: Thank you Carpedian for your good rating. Regarding the camera controlls of David: I recommend switching to the 2D cinema mode (can be found in settings) to avoid motion sickenss. Regarding the save-game: Yes the savegame is always on the host side which is the Goliath player. In case you should run into any troubles feel free to contact us via our discord: https://discordapp.com/invite/gQ3eyfY

reviews.review_title: A near perfect asymmetric co-op, gr8 fun
reviews.review_description: A cute and accessible asymmetric co-op game. The puzzles are not too hard but require constant verbal alignment between the two parties. Innocent mistakes quickly become friendly debates, also Goliath has the potential to prank David at the least ideal moments or places. This all results in a very fun atmosphere, and completing even the easiest levels feel a great joint accomplishment. The PC counterpart app (which plays David and connects to the Quest host) is free to download.
All the game needs is quick play and i hope it releases soon because i have no friends :(

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good rating! And Yes: We agree! We're trying to figure some things out to make it work. In the mean time can I invite you to join our discord, there is a #player-search channel there where other are looking for players too: https://discord.com/channels/514848385287847937/514865358692417567

reviews.review_description: We need more games that you can play with 2 people. Thank you for the great game, we had a blast!
